mapper.select: select dal.*, r.rank_name, d.dept_name from default_approval_line dal left join rank r on dal.approver_rank_seq = r.rank_seq left join departments d on dal.target_dept_seq = d.dept_seq where dal.doc_type = #{doc_type} order by dal.drafter_rank_seq, dal.step_order
mapper.delete: delete from default_approval_line where doc_type = #{doc_type} and drafter_rank_seq = #{drafter_rank_seq}
mapper.insert: insert into default_approval_line values (d_line_seq.nextval, #{doc_type}, #{drafter_rank_seq}, #{step_order}, #{approver_scope}, #{approver_rank_seq}, #{target_dept_seq, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, sysdate, sysdate)
mapper.select: select dal.*, r.rank_name, d.dept_name from default_approval_line dal left join rank r on dal.approver_rank_seq = r.rank_seq left join departments d on dal.target_dept_seq = d.dept_seq where dal.doc_type = #{doc_type} and dal.drafter_rank_seq = #{drafter_rank_seq} order by dal.step_order
